meta.title: Ariane & Giuseppe · 10.10.26 · Rome
meta.description: We're getting married in Rome. Come join us.

historia.p1: We met crossing the Atlantic. Our first date lasted as long as a flight: from take-off to landing.
historia.p2Lead: Coming down from the skies, I asked him to take it slow, and he replied:
historia.p3: Spoiler: not so much… because a few months later, here we are, about to get married.
historia.p4: Come along on this new journey — we'd be thrilled to have you close to celebrate our intense love.

elDia.title: How it'll go
elDia.subtitle: Three moments. One journey.
elDia.item1Desc: We pick you up at Hotel Nhow Rome — coffee for the early risers and an hour of Roman countryside before we arrive.
elDia.item1Tip: Be there ten minutes early. The bus won't wait.
elDia.item2Desc: Under the Roman sun, at Residenza Antica Flaminia. Forty minutes. A whole lifetime.
elDia.item3Desc: A few words from the bride and groom before the party, thanking every gesture and every gift that makes us feel at home.
elDia.item3Tip: If you'd like to leave us a gift, we've made it easy right here.
elDia.item4Desc: Aperitivo in the garden, a long lunch, toasts, music and dancing until the candles burn out.
elDia.item4Tip: Comfortable shoes. You'll stay till the end.
elDia.addAllToCalendar: Save the day to your calendar

llegar.title: We've got you
llegar.mapCaption: Tap the map to open in Google Maps
llegar.busDesc: Departure 10:30 from Hotel Nhow Rome. Return after the party.
llegar.carDesc: Private parking available at the Residenza.
llegar.moverseCity: To get around Rome, we recommend the <k>itTaxi</k> app and the <k>metro (lines A, B and C)</k>, ideal for reaching the main sights.
llegar.moverseCar: You can also rent a car or use car-sharing like <l>Free2move</l>, a practical option with insurance and fuel included.

alojamiento.title: Where to stay
alojamiento.intro: In Rome we recommend this central hotel, close to the bus pickup point.
alojamiento.bridge: And for those who'd rather stay in the villages near the wedding:
alojamiento.nhowNote: Write to <k>hotelbooking@wedinrome.com</k> and ask for the special rate.
alojamiento.rioNote: Country views, quiet, and just a few kilometers from the Residenza.

rsvp.title: Let us know
rsvp.subtitle: By August 1st, please
rsvp.name: Full name
rsvp.step2Intro: Same info, this time for the person joining you.
rsvp.successDesc: Thanks for confirming. See you in Rome.
rsvp.successHint: Before you go, two more things.
rsvp.errorDesc: Please try again in a moment.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: Any questions? Reach out to whoever works best for you:

gifts.title: A gift, if you'd like
gifts.intro: Your presence is our best gift. If you'd also like to contribute to our beginning together, here are our details.

playlist.title: The soundtrack
playlist.intro: These are what we'll play when you dance with us. Missing one? Add it yourself to our collaborative Spotify playlist.
